stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = ax − b, where a and b are constants with a > 1. In the xy-plane, the graph of y = f(x) has an x-intercept at (3, 0) and a y-intercept at (0, −7). What is the value of a?
rationale: From the y-intercept: f(0) = a0 − b = 1 − b = −7, so b = 8. From the x-intercept: f(3) = a3 − b = 0, so a3 = b = 8, giving a = 2. Since 2 > 1, this is consistent. The value of a is 2.
